column1: # Partition table matching bmorcelli/Launcher's expected layout for an
# installed app. POSEIDON lives in app1 (ota_0) at 0x170000; the Launcher
# itself occupies app0 (test) at 0x10000. Verbatim copy of
# so any bootloader and tooling compiled against that tree reads the
# same offsets we linked to. Building at the wrong offset = boots garbage.
